author.name: Saurabh Joshi
author.bio: Solution Architect, Problem Solver, Applied Researcher, and Educator
author.about: Problems are not confined to one area of research or technology. I strongly believe that one should learn any tool/technology/area that allows the problem at hand to be solved in the best possible manner. The diversity of my research publications, as well as technologies that I have worked with, is a testament to this belief. Please see my full [professional CV](/homepage_v2/assets/documents/sbjoshi_full_professional.pdf) and [academic CV](/homepage_v2/assets/documents/sbjoshi_full_academic.pdf) for details.
